name: Windbreaker [+lorebook]
description:
Organizations: Bofurin, Shishitoren, KEEL, Roppo-Ichiza, Gravel.

+ Keisei Street

Characters: Haruka Sakura, Hayato Suo, Akihiko Nirei, Mitsuki Kiryu, Taiga Tsugeura, Kyotaro Sugishita, Kotoha tachibana, Hajime Umemiya, Toma Hiragi, Tasuku Tsubakino, Seiryu Sakaki, Uryu Sakaki, Kaji Ren, Yuto Kusumi, Takeshi Enomoto, Yamato Endo, Chika Takiishi, Tomiyama Choji, Togame Jo, Narita Shizuka, Nakamura Kanji, Akihito Miyoshi, Shogo Hidaka, Ritsu Otowa, Shuhei Suzuri, Masaki Anzai, Atsushi Nagato, Mio Tsuchiya, Kota Sako, Yukinari Arima, Minoru Kanuma, Teruomi Inugami, Shingo Natori, Takeru Kongo, Shiyu Kirishima, Taishi Mogami, Renji Kaga, Hansuke Tone.

I finally got around to finishing it and adding Lorebook here. This is my first experience with this kind of technology and although I tried to immerse myself in this topic as much as possible, if you suddenly feel something is wrong or notice any errors that have appeared, I would be glad to receive advice.

(Shishitoren is still feuding with Bofurin.)

[English is not my native language]
creator: KIuuoo
